title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: CORELS (Certifiably Optimal Rule Lists)
steps.summary: CORELS (Certifiably Optimal Rule Lists) belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Model Compression. Compare it with Monotonic Rule Lists and Falling Rule Lists.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Falling Rule Lists
steps.summary: Falling Rule Lists belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Model Compression. Compare it with Monotonic Rule Lists and CORELS (Certifiably Optimal Rule Lists).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Monotonic Rule Lists
steps.summary: Monotonic Rule Lists belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Model Compression. Compare it with Falling Rule Lists and CORELS (Certifiably Optimal Rule Lists).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
